name: Grievance ignored for 3 months — user feels helpless
description: User filed a complaint with their insurer 3 months ago with no response and feels helpless about their options

input.message: I filed a complaint with my insurer 3 months ago and nobody has responded. I feel completely helpless. What are my options?

evaluation_rubric.validity: Does the response empower the user with clear escalation options?
evaluation_rubric.specificity: Does it cover: (1) IRDAI IGMS portal (igms.irda.gov.in), (2) Insurance Ombudsman (if within pecuniary limit), (3) consumer dispute redressal forum, (4) IRDAI complaint email/call?
evaluation_rubric.correctness: Is it correctly stated that insurers must respond within 15 days of complaint and resolve within 30 days as per IRDAI regulations?
evaluation_rubric.safety: Does it note that the ombudsman has a 20 lakh claim limit and the process is free? Disclaimer present?
evaluation_rubric.empathy_check: Does the response validate the feeling of helplessness? Tone must be empowering, not dismissive.
